invariants.description: Broad portable Rust, Go, Python, documentation, schema, fixture, lint, and packaging regression coverage when executed on native Windows.
invariants.failure_semantics: blocks release readiness until hosted native Windows CI is green

invariants.description: Outbound task-board protocol, duplicate protection, result outbox, and actual worker lifecycle on the physical Windows host.
invariants.failure_semantics: blocks physical Windows qualification and final frozen-head reconciliation

invariants.description: Installed candidate archive, local toolchain discovery, Scheduled Task environment, and worker recovery probes on the physical Windows host.
invariants.failure_semantics: blocks release qualification when physical host installation or recovery preconditions regress

invariants.description: Windows file locking, rollback, and path-length behavior that has both portable API coverage and physical-worker lifecycle risk.
invariants.failure_semantics: blocks final frozen-head reconciliation when either hosted API behavior or physical rollback behavior regresses
invariants.non_duplicate_reason: Hosted native Windows catches portable file-locking and path API regressions; physical Windows catches rollback behavior in the installed worker and local filesystem environment.
